notes.note:
[Smart Window][1] includes several enhancements:

 - Select text on a page and get quick access to summarize, explain, and more using the built-in assistant. ([Bug 2034921][2])
 - Added a row of shortcuts to New Tab, making it easier to get back to sites. ([Bug 2048338][3])


  [1]: https://www.firefox.com/smart-window
  [2]: https://bugzilla.mozilla.org/show_bug.cgi?id=2034921
  [3]: https://bugzilla.mozilla.org/show_bug.cgi?id=2048338

Fixed an issue that prevented email tracking protection from being disabled in the redesigned Firefox Settings. ([Bug 2049331][1])


  [1]: https://bugzilla.mozilla.org/show_bug.cgi?id=2049331

Fixed a hang that could occur after using a file picker dialog on macOS 26. ([Bug 2053177][1])


  [1]: https://bugzilla.mozilla.org/show_bug.cgi?id=2053177

Fixed the homepage not loading for some enterprise configurations that set it using a legacy autoconfig format. ([Bug 2047962][1])


  [1]: https://bugzilla.mozilla.org/show_bug.cgi?id=2047962

system_requirements:
## Windows

### Operating Systems (32-bit and 64-bit)
 - Windows 10 or later

### Recommended Hardware
-  1 gigahertz (GHz) or faster compatible processor or System on a Chip (SoC)
-  1GB of RAM / 2GB of RAM for the 64-bit version
-  500MB of hard drive space

---

## Mac

### Operating Systems
- macOS 10.15 or later 

### Recommended Hardware
- Macintosh computer with an Intel x86 or Apple silicon processor
- 512 MB of RAM
- 200 MB hard drive space

---

## GNU/Linux

### Software Requirements

*Please note that GNU/Linux distributors may provide packages for your distribution which have different requirements.*

- Firefox will not run at all without the following libraries or packages:
    - glibc 2.17 or higher (glibc 2.28 or higher on arm64)
    - GTK+ 3.14 or higher
    - libglib 2.42 or higher
    - libstdc++ 4.8.1 or higher (libstdc++ 6.0 or higher on arm64)
    - X.Org 1.0 or higher (1.7 or higher is recommended)
- For optimal functionality, we recommend the following libraries or packages:
    - DBus 1.0 or higher
    - NetworkManager 0.7 or higher
    - PulseAudio
title: Firefox 152.0.6 Release
